scripts.docker:prune: docker compose down -v --rmi all --remove-orphans && docker volume prune -f
scripts.test: cd services/games && bun test tests/unit && cd ../wallets && bun test tests/unit
scripts.test:e2e: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d && cd services/games && bun test tests/e2e
scripts.test:coverage: cd services/games && bun test tests/unit --coverage && cd ../wallets && bun test tests/unit --coverage
